subtitle: Safes, transfers, expenses, payroll, and staff transactions in one place.

guide.title: Quick Usage Guide
guide.step1: 1) Open monthly payroll and press Generate Payroll.
guide.step2: 2) Press Post as Payable to record as an expense.
guide.step3: 3) When paying, press Payout Salaries to deduct from cash safe.

cash.addSafeGuide: Add a cash safe or bank account here to track your money.
cash.transferGuide: Transfer money between safes without affecting revenue or expenses.

expenses.title: Monthly Payables
expenses.empty: No expenses found for this month

toast.addedFallback: Account added. Journal entry will be synced automatically.
toast.addedSuccess: Account added and opening balance recorded.
toast.repairSuccess: Safes and balances verified and repaired.
toast.payrollPaid: Payroll paid and cash safe updated.

error.noTenant: No laundry selected for current account.
error.selectBothSafes: Select both transfer and receiving safes
error.sameSafe: Cannot transfer to the same safe

loadErrorTitle: Accounts were not fully read. Displayed zeros may be inaccurate.
noSafeTitle: No readable safe found for this laundry.
noSafeSubtitle: Press the button below to create a main safe or add one manually.
noAccess: Accounting available to Owner and Ops Manager only.
